mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book (book_name, author, price, category_id, stock, publish_date, status) VALUES (#{book.bookName}, #{book.author}, #{book.price}, #{book.categoryId}, #{book.stock}, #{book.publishDate}, #{book.status})
mapper.select: SELECT book.book_name, book.author AS author, book.price, category.name AS categoryName, book.stock, book.publish_date, book.status FROM book LEFT JOIN category ON book.category_id = category.id WHERE book.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE book
book_name = #{bookName},
author = #{author},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO book (book_name, author, price, category_id, stock, publish_date, status) VALUES
(#{bookName}, #{author}, #{price}, #{categoryId}, #{stock}, #{publishDate}, #{status})
